stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding the usage of "social" language (as opposed to "professional" language) in a high workload situation? Assume the crew speak the same native language. Social language:

options.a: Encourages crew bonding and leads to more accurate interpretations of situations.
options.b: Encourages crew bonding and leads to a better use of intuition.
options.c: Can be imprecise, leading to false assumptions.
